case_title: MARINA CUNNINGHAM VS. FRED SIMS ET AL

docket_entries.description: SANCTIONS ORDERED IN THE AMOUNT OF $400.00 AGAINST GUNTER MIHAESCU, ESQ. FOR FAILURE TO APPEAR AT THE ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE HEARING ON: FEB-04-2020, PAYABLE ON OR BEFORE MAR-04-2020. NOTICE SENT BY COURT.

ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE SET FOR FEB-04-2020 CONTINUED TO MAR-24-2020 AT 10:30 AM IN DEPARTMENT 610 FOR FAILURE TO FILE PROOF OF SERVICE ON DEFENDANT(S) AND OBTAIN ANSWER(S), OR ENTER DEFAULT(S). ***NOTICE: IMPENDING DISCRETIONARY DISMISSAL PURSUANT TO GOVERNMENT CODE 68608(B).*** NOTICE SENT BY COURT.

MINI MINUTES: No appearance. Plaintiff's counsel, Gunter Mihaescu, Esq. is sanctioned $400.00 for failure to appear. The Order to Show Cause is re-set to Mar-24-2020 at 10:30 AM in Department 610.
